notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The source directly states the mysterious black-robed Gu Immortal's true identity as a seven-turn zombie with the special炎煌雷泽 body. This is hidden knowledge revealed to the reader but not known to all characters. The fact that残阳老君 and天聋老人 are fighting him suggests they may know his identity during the battle, but the source explicitly states this as '真正身份' (true identity), making it a hidden fact revealed to the reader.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed describes a chaotic battlefield with multiple conflicts (秦百胜 sacrifices himself, 黑城 falls, 回风子 intercepted, 姜钰 intercepted, etc.), but only observable actions/events are present. No character's internal motives, desires, fears, or bottom lines are directly stated or clearly inferable from the text. Most actions are combat reactions during a retreat/breakout scenario. Any inferred motive would be speculative without direct source support.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed contains only individual gu immortals (秦百胜, 凤九歌, 凌梅傲雪, 姜钰, 黑城, 回风子, 洪赤明, 陈振翅, etc.) engaged in combat. No named collective actors (factions, clans, families, halls, or organizations) appear as subjects with a concrete stake. 天聋老人 is identified as 黑天寺's太上长老 (ptr_16), but 黑天寺 is only mentioned as a background affiliation, not as an actor with a stake in the events of this chapter. The conflicts are all individual-level combat. No faction/group pressure can be reliably extracted from this seed.
IF export filter quarantined 8 legacy old-schema branches.
